name: Process Injection Via Mavinject Detected
description: Detects the use of `mavinject.exe` to inject a DLL into a running process. This is a technique used by adversaries to gain arbitrary code execution. `mavinject.exe` is a legitimate Windows utility, but its use for process injection is highly suspicious.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'mavinject.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the mavinject.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute mavinject.exe, including injection arguments and a DLL file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which mavinject.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
